name: benchmark
creator: elnix91
description: This is a benchmark for the graphics using Kandinsky. For having tested on different models those are the average scores: N100 : <7 N100 Upsilon : >7 N110 : Na N115 : 30 N120 : >30 I will surely upgrade this later, so the scores may change. I plan testing the printing power, the turtle and the capacity to run loops. Don’t hesitate to tell me if you find any bug on discord or by mail: @elnix91 elnix91@gmail.com
